config_files.notes: XML-based settings file. Larian's LSX format uses attribute nodes. Edit only while BG3 is fully closed. The game rewrites this file on exit.

keys.notes: The highest GPU cost setting in BG3. Act 2 (Shadow-Cursed Lands) is the most demanding area — shadow quality on Ultra in Act 2 outdoors can cost 30-40% GPU time versus Low on mid-range hardware.
Ultra textures require 8 GB+ VRAM. In Act 3 (Lower City) with many characters on screen, texture streaming pressure can cause stuttering on 6 GB cards at Ultra.

keys.effect: Volumetric fog and atmospheric scattering quality: 0=low, 1=medium, 2=high.
keys.notes: Fog quality is visually prominent in the Underdark and Act 2 Shadow-Cursed regions. Low fog degrades the visual atmosphere of these areas significantly.
CPU cost is moderate and increases in cutscenes with many characters. Safely disabled on performance hardware without significant visual impact.

manual_only_settings.recommendation: DLSS Quality on RTX hardware. FSR Quality on AMD (note: BG3's FSR implementation is FSR 1.0 spatial upscaler — quality is notably lower than DLSS or FSR 2/3). XeSS on Intel Arc. TAA is the native option and preferred on high-end hardware.
manual_only_settings.reason: Upscaler selection is in-game only. Note that BG3 shipped with FSR 1.0 — check if Larian has updated to FSR 2/3 in later patches.

manual_only_settings.recommendation: On for NVIDIA GPU owners. BG3 is not a competitive game so latency impact is minor, but Reflex reduces input lag during real-time combat.

notes: BG3 is one of the most demanding RPGs of its generation. Act 3 (Lower City) is the most GPU and CPU intensive area — benchmarks from Acts 1 or 2 underrepresent Act 3 performance. Inform users that their frame rate in Act 3 will be lower than earlier in the game.
Larian patched in significant performance improvements in Patch 5 (December 2023) and Patch 7 (September 2024). Benchmark data from before Patch 5 is not representative of current performance.
The GraphicSettings.lsx file is rewritten on game exit. Edit only while BG3 is closed.
BG3 supports Vulkan and DX11. Vulkan is the default and generally recommended. Switch to DX11 only if experiencing Vulkan-specific crashes.
